title: TSRJC Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TSRJC Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TSRJC Results 2026 have been officially released by TREIS on May 19, 2026. Students can check and download their TSRJC CET scorecards online at treirb.cgg.gov.in.

content.text: Telangana Residential Educational Institutions Society (TREIS) has officially released the TSRJC Results 2026 for the Common Entrance Test (CET) conducted for admissions into Residential Junior Colleges across Telangana for the academic year 2026-27. The entrance examination was held for students seeking admission into Class 11 in various streams including MPC (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry), BiPC (Biology, Physics, Chemistry), MEC (Mathematics, Economics, Commerce), and CEC groups. TSRJC Results 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://treirb.cgg.gov.in/.

Students who appeared for the TSRJC CET 2026 exam can now check and download their scorecards by entering their hall ticket number and date of birth or other login credentials on the official portal. The result includes details such as candidate name, marks secured, rank obtained, and qualifying status.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result scorecard and contact TREIS authorities in case of any discrepancies or errors.

TREIS has published the TSRJC CET Results 2026 for admissions into Residential Junior Colleges for the 2026-27 academic session. Students can check their rank, marks, and qualifying status online using their hall ticket number and login credentials from the official admission portal.

rows: TSRJC CET 2026 (Telangana State Residential Junior Colleges Common Entrance Test)
Hall Ticket Number, Date of Birth

content.text: TREIS has activated the direct link to check the TSRJC CET Results 2026 for admission into Residential Junior Colleges. Candidates can view or download their rank card and scorecard instantly through the official portal using the link provided in the table below.
Follow these simple steps to check your TSRJC CET Results 2026 online:

items: Visit the official website https://treirb.cgg.gov.in/ or https://admissionhalltickets.cgg.gov.in/
Click on the "TSRJC CET Results 2026" link available on the homepage
Enter your hall ticket number and date of birth or other required login credentials
Click on the submit button to view your result
Check your marks, rank, and qualifying status displayed on the screen
Download the scorecard and take a printout for counselling and future reference
